sections.sectionTitle: Moses in Israel-te a Thuman' ding uh Hanthawn

verses.text: “Tu-in Israel-te aw, note nungta-in, Topa, na pate uh Pasian in note hong piak leitangah va pai-in na luah theihna dingun note kong hilh thukhamte leh ngeina kipte don un la zui un
Topa na Pasian un hong piak ahi keima hong thugente na zuih theihna dingun no kong thupiakte behlap loin, zong na khiam kei ding uh hi
Na mit un Baalpeor-ah Topa' hihna mu khin hi; bang hang hiam cih leh na Pasian un note' lak panin Peor-a Baal a zui mi khempeuh susia a
ahih hangin Topa na Pasian uh a lenkipte khempeuh tuni-in na hinglai uh hi
“En un, note in a luah dingin na lutna uh gam sungah na zuih dingun Topa ka Pasian in kei hong thupiak bangin thukhamte leh ngeina kipte kong hilh khinzo hi

Tuate zui un la, sem un; bang hang hiam cih leh hih thukhamte khempeuh a zak uh ciangin, ‘Hih minam liante pen a pil thuthei taktak hi,’ a ci ding uh mite' muhna-ah hih thu pen nomau' pilna leh nomau' theihna hi ding hi
“Bang hang hiam cih leh eite in Topa i sap hun simin eite' kiangah i Pasian hong nai zahin tua bang pasian a nei minam lian koi-ah om ahi hiam
Tuni-in note kong hilh thute bangin thukham leh ngeina kip a man a nei minam lian koi-ah om ahi hiam?

“Na mit un a muhsa nate na nuntak sungun mangngilh kha-in, na lungsim panun paikhia khading ahih manin limtakin ngaihsunin hoihtakin kikem un. Horeb-a Topa na Pasian uh mai-ah na din' ni-un Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Leitungah a nuntak laiteng uh amaute in kei hong kihtakna ding leh amaute in a tate uh a hilhsawn theihna dingun keimah in amaute tungah ka thute ka zaksak theihna dingin ka kiangah mite hong khawm in,’ hong cihna thu, na tate uh leh na tate uh tate' tungah kitheisak un
“Mei in mual kangin van laizang dong banto-in, khuamial leh meii leh khuazing in a tuamcip laitakin note a nai-ah hong pai-in mual bulah na ding uh hi
Tua ciangin mei sung panin Topa in note' kiangah thu hong gen hi. Note in awging na za uh a, ahih hangin bangmah muloin, awging bek a om hi
Thupiak Sawmte ahi note' hih dinga hong thupiak ama thuciamna note' tungah hong gen a, amah in suangpeek nih tungah tuate a gelh hi
Note in na luah ding uh gam sungah na zuih theihna dingun, thukhamte leh ngeina kipte note kong hilhna ding tua hun laitakin Topa in kei thu hong pia hi.
“Tua ahih ciangin note hoihtakin kidawm un. Horeb-ah mei sung panin Topa in note' tungah thu hong gen ni-in bangmah mulo na hih manun
note-a' dingin lim khat peuhpeuh, pasal tawh a kibang hita leh numei tawh a kibang hita leh
leitunga om ganhing khat peuhpeuh tawh a kibang hita leh, huihlaka leeng kha a nei vasa khat peuhpeuh tawh a kibang hita leh
leitungah a bokvak khat peuhpeuh tawh a kibang hita leh, leinuai-ah a om tuisunga ngasa khat peuhpeuh tawh a kibang hita leh, a kiseek milim bawlna tawh a sia-in na gamtat khaklohna dingun kidawm un

Note in na mit uh tawh vantung lam ento-in, ni leh kha leh aksite, vantung na khempeuh na muh uh ciangin, mun khempeuha mite' tungah Topa na Pasian un a piak nate' lamah kihei-in tuate bia-in a na na sep khaklohna ding uh kidawm un
Ahih hangin Topa in tuni-a bangin sik meikhuk tawh a kibang Egypt panin ama neih mi dingin note hong la-in hong paikhiatpih khin hi
Tua thamloin note' hangin kei' tungah Topa heh a, keimah in Jordan kantan loin Topa na Pasian un note' gamh dingin hong piak leitang hoihah ka lutlohna dingin a kiciam hi
Hih gamah kei ka si ding a, Jordan khengin ka pai thei kei ding hi. Ahih hangin note in kantanin tua gam hoih na luah ding uh hi
Topa na Pasian un note tawh hong bawl thuciamna mangngilhin, Topa na Pasian un note' hih dinga hong kham lim khat peuhpeuh tawh a kibang a kiseek milim na bawlkhak lohna dingun kidawm un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh hong kangtum thei mei tawh kibang a, a haza Pasian ahi hi

“Note in tuleta nei-in gamsungah mi khangham na suah uh ciangin, na khat peuhpeuh tawh a kibang limin a kiseek milim bawlna leh Topa na Pasian uh' muhna-ah a sia bawlna tawh amah a hehna dingin na siat gamtat uh leh

Jordan galkhat luah dingin na paina leitang uhah na siat maimang baihna dingun note' langkhatah teci pang dingin tuni-in van leh lei ka sam hi. Tua leitang tungah note sauvei na hing kei ding uh a, na siamaimang ding uh hi
Topa in mite lakah note hong thehthang ding a, Topa in note hong hawlna minamte lakah mi tawmcik bek na omlai ding uh hi
Note in tua lai munah mite' khut in a bawl, khua mu theilo, khua za theilo, a ne theilo, a nam theilo sing leh suang pasian-te' na na sem ding uh hi
Ahih hangin tua lai panin Topa na Pasian uh na zong ding uh a, na lungsim khempeuh uh leh na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh na zon' uh leh amah na mu ding uh hi
Note in gimna thuakin, mailam hunah hih nate khempeuh note' tungah hong tun' ciangin, Topa na Pasian uh lamah kihei-in ama thu na mang ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh hehpihna a nei Pasian ahi hi. Amah in note hong tamasak loin, hong nusialo ding a, na pate uh tawh a thuciamna mangngilhlo ding hi

“Pasian in leitungah mi a pian'sak ni-a kipan, note' pian' ma-a hun beisa thu tu-in kan un la, van mong khat pan mong khat kikal thu zong kan un. Hih bang na lian piang ngei-in, a kiza ngei peuhmah hiam
Note in Pasian' aw za khin napi-in na hin' lai uh bangin meikuang sung panin pasian dang khat peuhpeuh' pauna aw mi khat peuhpeuh in za ngei ahi hiam

Tua ahih kei leh, Topa na Pasian un Egypt gam sungah note-a' dingin na muhna uhah a bawlte khempeuh tawh a kibangin, ze-etna, lim, na lamdang, gal, a vanglian leh a thahatna leh a lauhuai mahmah tawh pasian dang khat peuhpeuh in ama mite-a' dingin minamdang khat sung pan minam khat a va lak ding hanciam ngam ngei ahi hiam
Topa Pasian hi, ci-in na theihna dingun note' tungah hih thu hong kilak hi a, amah simloh kuamah dang omlo hi
Amah in note hong khal theihna dingin vantung panin ama aw note hong zasak hi. A mei lianpi leitungah note hong musak a, mei sung panin ama aw na za uh hi
Amah in na pate uh itin, amau' suanlekhakte hong teel a, amahmah in ama vanglian tawh Egypt panin note hong paikhiatpih a
note sangin a tamzaw leh a vanglian zawte' gamah hong paipihin, note' luah dingin amau' leitang hong piakna dingin note' mai-ah amaute hong hawlkhiatsak ahih manin tuni-in hih bangin na om thei uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin tunga om vantung hita leh nuai-a om leitung hita lehah Topa pen Pasian ahihna thu tuni-in thei un la, na lungsim uhah ciamteh un; kuamah dang omlo hi

Tua ahih ciangin note leh note' khita na tate uh tungah thu hong nuamin, Topa na Pasian un a tawntunga hong piak gam sungah na khan' uh na sausak theihna dingun tuni-a no kiangah kong gen ahi ama thukhamte leh a thupiakte na zui ding uh hi,” a ci hi.

Tua ciangin, a valsa hunah amah tawh kilangneihna a omlo, tumlopi-in a vengpa a that, mi that khapa va tai-in, hih khuapite khat peuhpeuhah taina tawh a suahtak theihna dingin Moses in nisuahna lam Jordan galkhatah khuapi thum a tuam koih hi
Reuben mite-a' dingin mualzang sehnel gam Beza khua, Gad mite-a' dingin Gilead gamsung Ramoth khua, leh Manasseh mite-a' dingin Bashan gamsung Golan khua ahi hi.
Moses in Israel mite tungah thu pia hi

Hihte pen, Egypt gam panin a paikhiatun Moses leh Israel mite in a zawh Heshbon-ah a teng Amor mite' kumpipa Sihon' gamsung, Jordan gal, Bethpeor tawh a kigalsai kuam sungah, Egypt panin Israel mite a paikhiat lai-in Moses in amaute tungah a gen thute ahi hi

Amaute in, Arnon kuam monga a om Aroer panin Sirion Mual (Hermon a cihna) dong, Jordan nisuahna lama om Arabah gam khempeuh, Pisgah mualpang nuai Arabah tuipi dong tawh, kumpi Sihon' leitang leh Bashan kumpi Og' leitang, Jordan galkhat nisuahna lamah a teng Amor kumpi nihte' leitang a luah uh hi.
